name: relay
description: Relay — connect to any database, browse it, and sync changes to external services.

scripts.dev: node scripts/setup-env.mjs && pnpm --filter @relay/core build && node scripts/banner.mjs dev && concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @relay/api dev" "pnpm --filter @relay/web dev"
scripts.start: node scripts/setup-env.mjs && pnpm build && node scripts/banner.mjs prod && concurrently -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @relay/api start" "pnpm --filter @relay/web start"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @relay/core build && pnpm --filter @relay/api build && pnpm --filter @relay/web build
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/core/dist apps/api/dist apps/web/.next packages/core/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo apps/api/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.clean:all: pnpm clean && rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules
